headline: Tractor Supply Company (TSCO) Expands Tool and Hardware Categories With SKIL Lineup
summary: Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ:TSCO) is one of the most undervalued large cap stocks to buy according to analysts. On June 1, Tractor Supply Company announced a significant storewide expansion of its truck, tool, and hardware categories to better serve DIYers, contractors, and hobby farmers. The initiative is highlighted by the launch of SKIL Power Tools, […]

headline: Tractor Supply Petcare Deal Shifts Growth Toward Services And Loyalty
summary: Tractor Supply (NasdaqGS:TSCO) has agreed to acquire VIP Petcare, the largest mobile veterinary services provider in the U.S. The deal expands Tractor Supply's in store vet care offerings, particularly in rural communities where access to pet healthcare is limited. The acquisition is intended to deepen customer engagement by adding recurring pet wellness visits to Tractor Supply's existing pet supplies business. For investors watching NasdaqGS:TSCO, this move comes at a time when the stock...

headline: Cove Capital Investments Successfully Acquires Grocery-Anchored Shopping Center in Princeton, Kentucky
summary: Cove Capital Investments, LLC is pleased to announce the successful acquisition of a premier grocery-anchored retail shopping center located at 500 US Highway 62 in Princeton, Kentucky.

headline: Guggenheim Maintains Buy on Tractor Supply, Lowers Price Target to $50
summary: Guggenheim  analyst Steven Forbes   maintains Tractor Supply (NASDAQ:TSCO) with a Buy and lowers the price target from $60 to $50.
